events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary drummer for The Beatles, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Ringo Birthday
angles.copy: Give a wave to the legendary Ringo Starr as he celebrates 86 years of rhythm and rock 'n' roll!

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist and astrophysicist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Brian May Birthday
angles.copy: Seventy-nine years young for the guitar legend and cosmic rock star, Brian May! What's your favourite Queen riff?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' charismatic frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Mick Jagger Birthday
angles.copy: Still got the moves at 83! Happy birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger – a true rock icon.

events.title: MTV launched (1981)
events.blurb: MTV, the music television channel, launched on this day in 1981, with The Buggles' "Video Killed The Radio Star" as its first broadcast.

angles.name: MTV Launch
angles.copy: Remember when MTV actually played music videos? Today marks 45 years since it all began with The Buggles!

events.title: Oasis's 'Definitely Maybe' released (1994)
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album, 'Definitely Maybe', in 1994.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: Twenty-nine years since Oasis dropped their debut 'Definitely Maybe' – the album that kicked off a Britpop phenomenon!

events.title: Woodstock Festival began (1969)
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, "3 Days of Peace & Music," began on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: Flashback to 1969: the start of Woodstock! Half a million people, three days of peace, music, and a lot of mud.

events.title: Elvis Presley passed away (1977)
events.blurb: Remembering the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who passed away on this day in 1977.

angles.name: Elvis Death Anniversary
angles.copy: Forty-nine years since the world lost the King. Elvis Presley's music and legacy continue to live on.

events.title: Remembering Tupac Shakur (1996)
events.blurb: On this day, we remember the influential rapper Tupac Shakur, who was shot in Las Vegas in 1996.

angles.name: Tupac Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering the profound impact of Tupac Shakur, whose voice shaped a generation.

events.title: Remembering Jimi Hendrix (1970)
events.blurb: We remember rock icon Jimi Hendrix, who tragically passed away in 1970, leaving an unparalleled musical legacy.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Tribute
angles.copy: Fifty-six years since we lost a true guitar visionary. Jimi Hendrix's sound still electrifies.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' released (1969)
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' in 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: That iconic zebra crossing! Forty-seven years since The Beatles gave us the masterpiece that is 'Abbey Road'.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' legendary frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde Birthday
angles.copy: Seventy-five years of cool for Chrissie Hynde! Still rocking as hard as ever with The Pretenders.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Liam Gallagher Birthday
angles.copy: Our Kid turns 54! Raise a glass to Liam Gallagher, still bringing the rock 'n' roll swagger.

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' released (1971)
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic song and album, 'Imagine', was released in 1971.

angles.name: Imagine Anniversary
angles.copy: Forty-five years since John Lennon asked us to 'Imagine' a better world with his timeless anthem.

events.title: Apple released the first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: Apple introduced the groundbreaking first-generation iPod in 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: iPod Anniversary
angles.copy: Remember your first iPod? Twenty-five years since Apple dropped the device that put '1,000 songs in your pocket'.

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: James Bond Day celebrates the premiere of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: James Bond Day
angles.copy: Shaken, not stirred, it's James Bond Day! Celebrating the enduring legacy of 007 since 'Dr. No' premiered.

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering the life and legacy of The Beatles' co-founder, John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday.

angles.name: John Lennon Birthday Tribute
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we celebrate the enduring spirit and music of John Lennon.
